activities_projects.title: Battle Strategy Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyze strategies used in the Battle of Plassey and Buxar
steps: Study the events of the Battle of Plassey and Battle of Buxar
Identify the strategies used by the East India Company and Indian rulers
Write a comparison explaining why the Company succeeded
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop analytical understanding of historical battles
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and comparison (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Company Administration Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Understand how the East India Company managed administration after gaining power
steps: Read about the Diwani rights given to the Company
Explain how revenue collection was managed
Discuss how this affected Indian farmers and rulers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyze administrative changes under Company rule
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and depth of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Case Study – Robert Clive
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate the role of Robert Clive in establishing Company rule
steps: Research Robert Clive’s role in Bengal
Identify his major decisions and actions
Write a short case study explaining his influence
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students evaluate historical leadership and decision making
activities_projects.evaluation: Critical understanding and factual accuracy (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Economic Impact Study
activities_projects.objective: Examine the economic effects of Company rule in India
steps: Identify economic changes after the Company gained Diwani rights
Explain how revenue policies affected agriculture and trade
Present findings in 8–10 points
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand economic consequences of colonial rule
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth and clarity of analysis (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Historical Source Interpretation
steps: Read a short historical description of the Battle of Plassey
Identify the viewpoint of the writer
Explain what information the source provides about the event
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops skills in interpreting historical sources

activities_projects.title: Debate – Company Rule: Opportunity or Exploitation
activities_projects.objective: Critically evaluate the effects of Company rule
steps: Divide the class into two groups
One group supports the view that Company rule improved trade
The other argues that it exploited Indian resources
Present arguments with historical examples
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Encourages critical thinking and argument skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of arguments and evidence (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Power Expansion Flow Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand how political control expanded step by step
steps: List major events such as Plassey, Buxar, and the grant of Diwani
Create a detailed flowchart showing how each event increased Company power
Explain the flowchart in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students visualize the gradual growth of Company authority

activities_projects.title: Comparison Study – Plassey vs Buxar
activities_projects.objective: Compare two major battles of the chapter
steps: Create a table comparing Plassey and Buxar
Include year, leaders, causes, and outcomes
Explain why Buxar strengthened Company power further
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop comparative historical analysis skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Completeness and accuracy of comparison (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Historical Report – Company Expansion
steps: Write a detailed report explaining how the East India Company expanded its rule in India
Include important battles, treaties, and policies
Conclude with the impact on Indian society
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Improves structured historical writing and analysis
activities_projects.evaluation: Organization and depth of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Young Historian Research Poster
activities_projects.objective: Encourage deeper research on colonial expansion
steps: Choose a theme such as Company rule, battles, or economic policies
Collect important information and visuals
Create a research poster and present it in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students synthesize information from multiple sources
